testcase.name: 3110-concept-relationship-node-relationship-source-testcase
Concept Relationship Node Relationship Source Testcase
testcase.description: Table linkbase test case using a concept relationship node with different relationship sources

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a relationship source of xfi:root
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. The relationship source is the special value xfi:root, so the full presentation network starting from the root(s) is included. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a relationship source of xfi:root, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. The relationship source is the special value xfi:root, so the full presentation network starting from the root(s) is included.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with the relationship source omitted
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of primary items as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. No relationship source is specified, so the full presentation network starting from the root(s) is included. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with the relationship source omitted, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of primary items as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. No relationship source is specified, so the full presentation network starting from the root(s) is included.

variation.name: Concept relationship node for part of a presentation network
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of primary items as rows. The specified relationship source selects only part of the presentation network - concepts that are descendants of o5. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node for part of a presentation network, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of primary items as rows. The specified relationship source selects only part of the presentation network - concepts that are descendants of o5.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with multiple relationship sources
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of primary items as rows. Several relationship sources are specified, resulting in a tree with multiple roots. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with multiple relationship sources, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of primary items as rows. Several relationship sources are specified, resulting in a tree with multiple roots.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with invalid (non-existent) relationship source
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies a non-existent concept as the relationship source.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with invalid (hypercube) relationship source
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies a hypercube as the relationship source.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with invalid (dimension) relationship source
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies a dimension as the relationship source.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a relationship source expression
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The relationship source is specified by an XPath expression that evaluates to a QName. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a relationship source expression, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The relationship source is specified by an XPath expression that evaluates to a QName.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with both relationship sources and relationship source expressions
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of primary items as rows. Several relationship sources are specified, using a combination of literal QNames and XPath expressions, resulting in a tree with multiple roots. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with both relationship sources and relationship source expressions, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of primary items as rows. Several relationship sources are specified, using a combination of literal QNames and XPath expressions, resulting in a tree with multiple roots.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a relationship source expression that does not evaluate to a QName
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies a relationship source using an XPath expression that does not evaluate to a QName.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a relationship source expression that evaluates to a sequence
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies a relationship source using an XPath expression that evaluates to a sequence of more than one QName.
